title: A thousand trails home, with Seth Kantner

title: SNC Welcomes Brittany Brown as Director of Marketing and Communications
summary: Sitnasuak Native Corporation is excited to announce the hire of Shareholder, Brittany Brown as their Director of Marketing and Communications. Brown comes to the organization with over 11 years of experience in Public and Community Relations to lead and grow their communications and marketing initia...

title: Documenting the Impact of Pacific Herring
summary: Larisa Manewal is exploring the cultural and community importance of strong Pacific herring runs in southeast Alaska. The post Documenting the Impact of Pacific Herring appeared first on Alaska Magazine .
